title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Mjosgard, Vivi, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Sabo as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Someone knows I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What did they do to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My precious son!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh? Where'd the queen downager go...

dialogue.speaker: Mjosgard
dialogue.text: Don Quixote Mjosgard is an odd man..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's a celestial dragon that doesn't own a single slave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's just like homing, who descended to the surface over 30 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Don Quixote Family is full of nut- jobs, I tell you!!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Father, DAT'S...!! The Invincibool slave, Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Remember, the percentage

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is!! It was finally my turn to rent him again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hitting him is fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stab- Bing him is fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe I ran into him so soon...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My infiltration Mission is a success!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He doesn't scream, and he doesn't cry. He's a top-class slave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But that's absolute- Ly....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: unforgiv- able...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooo, I'm 500 jealous, Daddy!! Wait, DAT doesn't matter, cuz I'm about to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Absolute- Ly....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: beneath...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Don't get so worked up, SABO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: THE GROUND!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, you! Boys are so scaryyyyyl!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's impossible not to be!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of our comrades has ended up in a situation like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Jewelry Bonney
dialogue.text: That gentle Kuma!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I know. We all feel the same way as you do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way we can leave Kuma- San to this fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it too cramped? Should I make it more spa- clous?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Soish...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the reason we came here, after all...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...however.... even if we do rescue him....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He won't return to being the Kuma we once knew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but!! Kuma-chan's life itself has been sacrificed to the world government!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because he was the former King of a country allied with the world government, they decided to make an example of him for the world to see!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They wanted to show that the power of a person is irrelevant. He's their example of what happens when you defy the gods!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The celestial dragons control CP-O and the Marine HQ!! If we do this poorly and get caught...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No. There is no poorly. We have two options... suggests or death...h!!!

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
